diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -6,8 +6,8 @@
 class RobustCIFAR100N(nn.Module):

     def __init__(self, num_classes=100):

         super(RobustCIFAR100N, self).__init__()

-        # Use a pre-trained ResNet50 model

-        self.backbone = models.resnet50(weights='IMAGENET1K_V2')

+        # Use a pre-trained ResNet18 model (smaller than ResNet50, more suitable for CIFAR-100)

+        self.backbone = models.resnet18(weights='IMAGENET1K_V2')

         # Replace the final classifier layer to match our number of classes

         num_features = self.backbone.fc.in_features

         self.backbone.fc = nn.Identity()  # Remove the original classifier

     # Training loop

+    num_epochs = 20  # Increase epochs since using robust loss
